methods.name: archive
methods.summary: Snapshot the vault's git history into a destination.

methods.name: bundle
methods.summary: Assemble a token-budgeted context bundle for a task.

methods.name: check
methods.summary: Run the vault integrity check.

methods.name: collection/get
methods.summary: Read a single collection by name.

methods.name: collection/list
methods.summary: List every configured collection with a live record count.

methods.name: cron/list
methods.summary: List the configured cron jobs.

methods.name: cron/run
methods.summary: Run a cron job by name and return its buffered output.

methods.name: digest
methods.summary: Summarize vault activity since a commit cursor.

methods.name: graph
methods.summary: Derive the link graph and summarize it.

methods.name: index/rebuild
methods.summary: Clear the derived cache and reindex from scratch.

methods.name: index/run
methods.summary: Incrementally index the vault.

methods.name: memory/edit
methods.summary: Apply a memory verb to a vault file and reindex the change.

methods.name: memory/remember
methods.summary: Store a fact add-only, appending to the nearest note or creating a dated note.

methods.name: mount/list
methods.summary: List the configured mounts.

methods.name: note/get
methods.summary: Read the parsed note at a vault-relative path.

methods.name: query
methods.summary: Run hybrid retrieval and return the ranked hits.

methods.name: record/create
methods.summary: Create a record in a collection from validated fields and a markdown body.

methods.name: record/delete
methods.summary: Archive a record by path and report the terminal status.

methods.name: record/get
methods.summary: Read a single record by its vault-relative path.

methods.name: record/list
methods.summary: List records in a collection, filtered and ordered.

methods.name: record/patch
methods.summary: Merge fields into a record's frontmatter and optionally replace its body.

methods.name: rpc.discover
methods.summary: Return this OpenRPC discovery document.

methods.name: status
methods.summary: Report index health.
